message:
test(proptest): add 4 property tests for policy metrics and compliance telemetry adapters

Covers PolicyMetricsDashboard->UnifiedTelemetryRecord health tier mapping,
failure class derivation (kill switch -> Safety, invalid chain -> Corruption),
counter passthrough, and ComplianceSnapshot->UnifiedTelemetryRecord conversion.
All 49 runtime telemetry proptests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
